## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss priorities, strategies, and resource allocation to drive growth and improve operational efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to shift from exploratory AI research mindset to an enterprise software company strategy](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
  - [Prioritize developing a clear product strategy aligned with target customer needs and market trends](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2142.0)
  - [Hire additional resources (PMM, copywriter) to enable more strategic work and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2695.0)
  - [Focus on high-impact activities that move the needle rather than getting bogged down in busy work](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)

## Topics

### Fundraising and Growth Mindset

  - [Marcel sees signals that the company is ready to shift from a cost-cutting mindset to investing in growth](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2067.0)
  - [Need to increase bandwidth and leverage to move faster](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
  - [Opportunity to raise money, but require a solid strategy first](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)

### Web Development Roadmap

  - [Prioritizing key projects like improving the glossary experience](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Considering keeping Webstacks for specific projects while ramping up Lightbox](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Potentially hiring a full-time in-house developer in Q4](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

### Product Marketing Priorities

  - [Josh shared his current priorities across launches, content, and ongoing PMM work](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2159.0)
  - [Key launches: Agent API, Accelerator Program, Enterprise Announcement](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2274.0)
  - [Struggling with bandwidth constraints and need for more strategic, customer-focused work](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2643.0)
  - [Proposed hiring a copywriter and additional PMM resource](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2695.0)

### Strategic Alignment

  - [Need to align on target enterprise segments and develop tailored playbooks](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2142.0)
  - [Transition from treating enterprise as an exploratory frontier to a focused software strategy](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2870.0)
  - [Develop compelling customer stories and positioning to create FOMO](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to review Josh's priorities and provide input on focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/EYCDLcBUanNhsxLk9ysCYr14xoSY7afN?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
